transcript: Speaker A (Thought): Okay, she's here. Just say: 'You look gorgeous today, simple, smooth. Go!' Speaker B (Man): You look really Gorilla today. Speaker C (Interviewer): So tell me, Mr. Fayyaz, why should we hire you? Speaker A (Thought): Okay, you are prepared for this. Just say: 'I work well under pressure and I always meet my deadlines.' Speaker B (Man): I pressure under work, sir. And my deadlines meet me always. Speaker D (Friend): और भाई, क्या हाल है? कैसी गई डेट? और आज तेरा इंटरव्यू भी था ना? [Hey brother, how are you? How was the date? And you had an interview today too, right?] Speaker B (Man): मत पूछ यार। सब सीन हो गया भाई। दिमाग में सब कुछ क्लियर चलता है कि क्या बोलना है, लेकिन जैसे ही बोलने की बारी आती है, सब गड़बड़। [Don't ask, man. Everything went wrong. Everything is clear in my head about what to say, but as soon as it's time to speak, everything gets messed up.] Speaker D (Friend): तो तू SpeakeX क्यों नहीं ट्राई करता? इसमें एक AI टीचर है, सिया, जो तेरा दिमाग सोच रहा है, वही सही सेंटेंस में बाहर निकालना सिखाती है। रियल सिचुएशंस, डेली प्रैक्टिस और कोई जज नहीं करता। [Then why don't you try SpeakeX? It has an AI teacher, Sia, who teaches you to bring out what your brain is thinking in correct sentences. Real situations, daily practice, and no one judges you.] Speaker B (Man): Hey, I'm sorry about that day. Actually, I meant to say you're looking gorgeous, but my tongue slipped. By the way, are you free in the evening? Sure, I'll pick you up at 6. पहले सिर्फ दिमाग में ठीक चलता था, अब बाहर भी सही आता है। So download SpeakeX and do comment for the direct app link in your DM. [Earlier it only went well in my head, now it comes out right too. So download SpeakeX and do comment for the direct app link in your DM.]
on_screen_text: 🧠: 'You look gorgeous today, simple. Smooth. Go!' / 'You look really Gorilla today' / 🧠: 'I work well under pressure and I always meet my deadlines' / 'I pressure under work sir. And my deadlines meet me always..' / Comment 'SIA' to get the app link 🔗
summary: A young man repeatedly blunders his English during a date and a job interview because he cannot translate his thoughts into spoken words. A friend suggests SpeakeX, an app with an AI tutor named Sia that helps users practice real-life conversations. After using the app, he successfully speaks English and prompts viewers to comment 'SIA' for the download link.
